title: [codereview-3] EDHOC A_3 C fix introduced potential stack pressure with larger a_3[96]; verify on STM32WL
description: P3: Buffer increased from 64 to 96 bytes in two functions. On constrained STM32WL (64KB RAM), this is acceptable but should be reviewed for stack usage in full node init. P4: No EAD_3 support yet (optional per spec).
